# Pull request summary

- describe the change
- explain why it is needed

## Validation

- [ ] build succeeded
- [ ] tests succeeded
- [ ] docs updated when behavior or setup changed

## Release governance

- [ ] pull request title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, ...)
- [ ] release or changelog impact was considered for user-visible changes

## Notes for reviewers

Call out any follow-up work, risks, or decisions that need attention.
